---
title: "Where to Dance in KW"
date-modified: today
language:
  title-block-modified: "Last Updated"
---
## Saturday April 25, 2026

### 👉 Harm Reduction Vibe Production - Dance Party Sanguen Funraiser

Location: The Union @ [124 Sydney St. S. Kitchener](https://www.google.com/maps/place/124+Sydney+St+S,+Kitchener,+ON+N2G+3V2/)

#### 7pm-11pm

* [Kasia](https://www.instagram.com/koshkasia)
* [Half Eyes](https://www.instagram.com/jamesbrown.forestking)
* [Sylent Syd](https://www.instagram.com/sylentsyd/)

[Tickets](https://luma.com/7sevuph4)


---

> Know of a dance party that we should share? [DM us](https://www.instagram.com/fearisthevibekiller/) or [email us](mailto:getdown@fearisthevibekiller.com).
